blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Come to think of it…
Shirone recalled that Ares's profession was an explorer and soon understood.

blocks.speaker: Ares
blocks.content: He said he was making maps.

blocks.speaker: Ares
blocks.content: Wherever I go, I hear about you. How's Amy? Is she doing well?

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Don't tell me you haven't been home?

blocks.speaker: Ares
blocks.content: Haha! Life turned out that way. I send letters occasionally, but I can't receive replies.
Ares seemed happy, which was typical of the free-spirited Carmis family.

blocks.speaker: Ares
blocks.content: Anyway…
After their pleasant reunion, he became aware of the surrounding gazes and whispered.

blocks.speaker: Ares
blocks.content: Let's go somewhere quiet first. You're trying to enter the Pyramid of Truth, right? Let's talk.
Although the mission was still dangerous, it was good to hear about Ares's recent activities.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Shall we have a meal then?

blocks.speaker: Ares
blocks.content: Sure. My team is waiting. I'll introduce you to them, so take a good look. They're all capable people.
Despite his subtle attempt to turn it into an interview, Shirone remained unfazed.

blocks.speaker: Ares
blocks.content: How have you been?
There was no need to ask who he was referring to.
Stang National Magic School.
The last training session ended at sunset.
Huff. Huff.
Wizard was breathing heavily, but her expression was full of accomplishment.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: I did it.
She had learned everything Shirone could teach, the essence of Shirone himself.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Congratulations, Wizard.
The teachers clapped, and Shirone and Amy, who had been watching the training, walked over.
The reason they couldn't just smile was that her first real battle would be too harsh.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Can she do it?

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Kill.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Even if it's the worst human in the universe, killing someone is not easy. It's something separate from skill. If Wizard hesitates even for a moment…

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Havitz would not miss that gap.

blocks.speaker: Wizard
blocks.content: Teacher.
Wizard looked up at Shirone with clear eyes.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Good eyes.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Clear and bright, as if she couldn't even kill a bug.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: But that's why it's possible.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Although he didn't intend to glorify it, Wizard's thinking transcended the realm of killing.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: She has no resentment towards Havitz, no special purpose or will. Pure beyond humanity.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: That's why she could see through Vanishing.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: It's like a natural phenomenon. No, her mind is already nature. To describe Wizard…

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: A benevolent Havitz, perhaps?
The deep meaning in those words weighed heavily on his heart.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: The only natural enemy. This is the only way.

blocks.speaker: Wizard
blocks.content: Everything is ready.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Alright. Let's go.
Zybro, where the Holy War Assembly is held.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Rest well today. We'll leave the Kingdom of Stang tomorrow. I'll go with you.

blocks.speaker: Wizard
blocks.content: Yes. Thank you for everything.
As Wizard walked away, Shirone sighed, and Amy patted his shoulder.

blocks.speaker: Amy
blocks.content: You did your best. Trust her.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: I should.
Shirone's eyes softened for a moment, and he suddenly turned his head as if he remembered something.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Oh, by the way, have you heard from Ares?

blocks.speaker: Amy
blocks.content: Huh? My brother? No, I haven't. Why?

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Well… he's actually with me now. In the Kingdom of Paras. It seems he's investigating the pyramid.
Amy, who had been blinking in a daze, suddenly frowned.

blocks.speaker: Amy
blocks.content: That idiot…
Then she grabbed Shirone's ear and shouted.

blocks.speaker: Amy
blocks.content: Hey! If you're alive and well, you should come home at least once! Do you know how worried Mom and Dad are?
Shirone winced, but Amy was half out of her mind.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Ouch!

blocks.speaker: Amy
blocks.content: Stop, stop!

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: That's not how you do it. This is…
But when he saw the tears in Amy's eyes, he couldn't say anything.

blocks.speaker: Amy
blocks.content: I really thought you were dead…
Shirone hugged Amy and patted her back.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: It's okay. He's doing well.
Wizard, who had turned around at the entrance of the training ground, had been watching them for a long time.
Nagnak Oasis.

blocks.speaker: Ares
blocks.content: When this is over, you should contact them. They're very worried.
Ares smiled sadly.

blocks.speaker: Ares
blocks.content: …Really?
When you love your work too much, you can end up hurting the people you love.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Ares!
At the rough voice, Shirone looked ahead.
Three people who appeared to be Ares's team members were looking puzzled.
Shirone recognized one of them.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Great Swordmaster Euphrates.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Except for the gray beard, he looked almost identical to his younger self recorded in Omega.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: A master of dual swords. Belligerent personality.
He must have been well over sixty, but he still seemed to be active.
The other two looked like a couple, in their late twenties, wearing priestly robes.

blocks.speaker: Glen
blocks.content: Ares, who are these people?

blocks.speaker: Ares
blocks.content: Arian Shirone. Amy's boyfriend.
That was all the introduction needed since there were few in the world who didn't know Shirone.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Yahweh?

blocks.speaker: Glen
blocks.content: Nice to meet you. I am…
As Shirone extended his hand for a handshake, he noticed the priests frowning slightly.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: They're from the Lami Diocese.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: If they were wary upon hearing the name Yahweh, they could only be followers of the monotheistic Lami faith.

blocks.speaker: Glen
blocks.content: What's going on?

blocks.speaker: Ares
blocks.content: Well, it's just that…
In other situations, there would be no need for introductions, but this time was different.

blocks.speaker: Ares
blocks.content: We were rejected at the government office. Even after showing the minister's certification, it was no use.

blocks.speaker: Glen
blocks.content: What do you mean? The Vatican lobbied… I mean, persuaded them so much to get that.

blocks.speaker: Glen
blocks.content: Give it to me. I'll go.

blocks.speaker: Ares
blocks.content: No need. They won't listen no matter what we say. Besides, there's a rumor that the current king isn't normal.

blocks.speaker: Euphrates
blocks.content: So what does that have to do with bringing Yahweh? Can he get us in?

blocks.speaker: Ares
blocks.content: Exactly.

blocks.speaker: Euphrates
blocks.content: Huh?

blocks.speaker: Ares
blocks.content: He has a pass directly approved by the king. With this, we can get a free pass too.
Shirone interjected.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: I never said I'd accompany you.
As the priests' expressions grew serious, Ares pushed Shirone forward and said,

blocks.speaker: Ares
blocks.content: Come on! Let's eat first.
As Ares led Shirone's group away, he winked at the priests.

blocks.speaker: Glen
blocks.content: …What should we do?

blocks.speaker: Arin
blocks.content: Let's go for now. The Pope has high hopes for this expedition.
If there was something in the outer world, it had to be the monotheistic god believed by the Lami faith.
Thus, ten people gathered in a restaurant and sat side by side at a long table.

blocks.speaker: Ares
blocks.content: When Ares introduced himself, Kanis and Arin looked surprised.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: So that's Ares. I didn't recognize him because of the beard, but now I see his eyes resemble Amy's.

blocks.speaker: Ares
blocks.content: These two priests are from the Lami faith, as you might have guessed.

blocks.speaker: Glen
blocks.content: You know the Vatican is divided into two departments: the Diocese Management Department and the Holy Knights Department.

blocks.speaker: Glen
blocks.content: Yes.

blocks.speaker: Glen
blocks.content: The Holy Knights Department had paladins.

blocks.speaker: Glen
blocks.content: Glen and Lucia work in the Diocese Management Department. Both are top-notch clergy.
For priests, faith was like mental strength for wizards; Shirone understood its significance.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Indeed, if it's a mission to investigate ancient civilizations, the Vatican wouldn't send just anyone.

blocks.speaker: Ares
blocks.content: Next, he introduced Great Swordmaster Euphrates, and then it was Shirone's group's turn.

blocks.speaker: Glen
blocks.content: Dragons.
They had seen Ice Dragon Frigi and Earth Dragon Argan fill an oasis with their breath a few days ago.
Although they were in polymorph form now, the chill from that time still lingered in their bodies.

blocks.speaker: Ares
blocks.content: Now that we've introduced ourselves and while we wait for food, let's hear it. How did you get the king's approval? I heard he's eccentric and reckless.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: We got help from Zulu.
When Shirone explained what had happened so far, Ares's group nodded in understanding.

blocks.speaker: Ares
blocks.content: Hmm, you stayed quite a while. But it's good you got the permit.

blocks.speaker: Ares
blocks.content: So…
Ares pointed his thumb at himself.

blocks.speaker: Ares
blocks.content: Let us join too.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: No.
Ares looked stunned by the immediate rejection while Glen and Lucia frowned.

blocks.speaker: Glen
blocks.content: I'm sorry. I'd like to help you too, but this is really dangerous.

blocks.speaker: Glen
blocks.content: How do you know?

blocks.speaker: Kanis
blocks.content: The Vatican has eyes and ears too. Ancient civilizations are related to the outer world, but no one knows exactly what kind of place it is.
Shirone knew this well.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Shall I say it? Yahweh, you just don't want Lami to investigate the Pyramid of Truth. If God's existence is proven there, Yahweh will be considered heretical.

blocks.speaker: Glen
blocks.content: I don't care about that.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Then why not let us join? Do you think we'll give up because it's dangerous? Ares and Euphrates here are stronger than your friends sitting next to you!

blocks.speaker: Kanis
blocks.content: What did you say?
Kanis flared up.
Kanis's shadow had already extended beyond his back.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Magical creature.
As long arms emerged from both sides of Kanis's shadow, Euphrates also revealed his killing intent.

blocks.speaker: Ares
blocks.content: What is this atmosphere? He's my sister's boyfriend. Everyone calm down.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: This is pointless. The pass is mine. Forming a team is my right.

blocks.speaker: Glen
blocks.content: Exploring God's existence is our right. If we can't go in, neither can you.

blocks.speaker: Kanis
blocks.content: Shirone, just accept it. Glen or whatever your name is—does your god tell you to steal other people's passes?

blocks.speaker: Glen
blocks.content: Don't invoke God's name carelessly! This is my personal fight!

blocks.speaker: Ares
blocks.content: Haha! It's personal now? Well then…

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Stop it!

blocks.speaker: Lucia
blocks.content: Don't blaspheme God anymore! Glen is doing this because of me.

blocks.speaker: Lucia
blocks.content: Glen, let's give up.

blocks.speaker: Glen
blocks.content: No way. I'll find a way to get into the Pyramid of Truth no matter what.

blocks.speaker: Kanis
blocks.content: Then go get your own pass.
Ignoring Kanis's sarcastic remark, Glen stared straight at Shirone.

blocks.speaker: Glen
blocks.content: Let's decide here. You or me—who is more suitable to explore God?

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: I'll make it clear: I refuse. I don't want to fight anyone. I'm sorry, Ares.
Since Glen had ruined the atmosphere this time even Ares had nothing to say,

blocks.speaker: Ares
blocks.content: We should leave now.
As Shirone tried to leave his seat Glen glared fiercely and lunged at him,

blocks.speaker: Glen
blocks.content: Wait!

blocks.speaker: Amy
blocks.content: Glen! Please… Ugh!
Lucia who had stood up to stop her lover suddenly clutched her chest and collapsed on the floor,

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Lucia!

blocks.speaker: Amy
blocks.content: Aah! Aah!
Her entire body trembled with immense pain as veins rose along her neck reaching her cheeks,

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Lucia! Hang in there! Just a little longer! Lucia!
Shirone immediately recognized it,

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: The emotional disease.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: It was a disease created by demons that had spread across continents reaching even the Vatican.
